creator: joel@tahoestores.com
text:
Hi, thanks. /etc/make.conf has DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=python=3.9

I ran make test for python3.9 which largely passed. But now the install directory is locked up and I can't do anything with it.

So I guess it is onward to python310.

At this point, although everything except firefox-esr builds and runs, working with python is like the wild wild west.

While not a profession comment, I tend to agree python39 is a disaster and probably borked:)

ps we are talking about the "port" and not the "pkg".
